summary: Create an associative patch surface from an attended preselection/interactive loop, with governed continuity and bulge inputs.

continuity.description: Patch edge continuity: position (G0), tangency (G1), or curvature (G2).

bulge_magnitude.description: Patch bulge magnitude. Autodesk documents 0..1 as the practical range, with 0 flat and 1 most curved.

notes: Attended-only census coverage for SURFPATCH. The native associative API exposes continuity and bulge as scalar parameters; edge/curve/point references come from the user's attended selection context. The governed template therefore fixes the command path and exposes only the bounded scalar inputs.
